---
title: "ABI/Inform"
page-layout: article
---

# ABI/Inform

**Provider:** ProQuest

## Description

Business research database providing scholarly articles, trade publications, company profiles, industry reports, and business news. Supports research in management, finance, accounting, marketing, entrepreneurship, and economics.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, News & Media, Scholarly Literature
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Market Research
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Market Research

## Links

- [Access resource](https://www.proquest.com/abicomplete/index?accountid=15172)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
